title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Deloitte India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Deloitte India
jsonLd.description:
Deloitte India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Deloitte India:
Deloitte India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
